reset.title: Change password
reset.openLink: Open the link we emailed you to continue.
reset.error: Could not change the password. Try again.
reset.doneText: You can now sign in with your new password.

meta.homeTitle: Link x Link — Connect with local people on WhatsApp
meta.homeDescription: Discover profiles of people near you and contact them directly on WhatsApp. No sign-up, no hassle.
meta.appDescription: Browse local people profiles and contact them directly on WhatsApp.

landing.description: Discover profiles of people near you and contact them directly on <wa>WhatsApp</wa>. No sign-up, no hassle.
landing.benefit1Text: Real people from your area, with photos and description.
landing.benefit2Text: One tap opens WhatsApp. No middleman chats.
landing.how1: Register your profile and get visibility.
landing.how2: Share the platform so other people join.
landing.how3: Enter the app and swipe through profiles.
landing.how4: Interested in someone? Tap the WhatsApp button.
landing.how5: Something not working? Report it and help the community.
landing.how6: Join our <tg>Telegram community</tg> to help maintain the app, report bugs, and ask for help.
landing.faq1Q: Why does my profile need approval?
landing.faq1A: To maintain a safe and quality environment, all new profiles are reviewed by our moderators. Only approved profiles will be visible to the community.
landing.faq2A: You can pause or hide your profile at any time from the 'My Profile' section. Also, if you receive multiple reports, your profile will be hidden automatically.
landing.faq3Q: Why do I already appear in the app without registering?
landing.faq3A: Your profile was likely migrated because you gave prior consent in one of the unofficial Link x Link groups. You can claim ownership of your profile by registering with your WhatsApp number.
landing.faq4Q: How can I become a moderator?
landing.faq4A: We choose the most active users who help the community as moderators. If you are interested, you can request it by writing to us on our Telegram channel.
landing.supportText: Link x Link is a free and independent project. If you like the app and want to help maintain the servers and keep improving it, you can buy me a coffee!
landing.acceptTerms: I accept the <eula>terms and conditions</eula>, the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy> and the <data>data usage</data>.

feed.whatsappMessage: Hi {{name}} 👋, I saw you on Link x Link :: https://linkxlink.vercel.app/
feed.emptyDesc: No more profiles for now. Come back later or share the app to discover more people.
feed.error: Could not load profiles. Check your connection.
feed.swipeHint: Swipe the card to see the next one
feed.undo: ← I changed my mind, go back
feed.previewBanner: Complete your profile to see all profiles and get in touch.
feed.previewEnd: This is just a taste. Complete your profile see every profile.
feed.pausedUntil: You're invisible until {{date}}. Tap to change it.
feed.pausedHidden: Your profile is hidden. Tap to become visible again.

swaps.warning: You have made {{count}} interactions today. Opening too many new chats may get your number temporarily blocked by WhatsApp.
swaps.limitReached: You reached the limit of {{max}} interactions in 24 hours. Come back later.

gate.authText: Create your account or log in to see the profiles.
gate.profileText: You have an account. Create your profile to unlock the app.

register.title: Create your profile
register.alreadyActive: Your profile is already published. You're live in the app!
register.alreadyPending: You already submitted your profile. It's pending moderator approval.
register.intro: Publish your profile so other people can find you and message you on WhatsApp.
register.shareHelp: To register, share Link x Link with at least {{count}} people/groups on WhatsApp.
register.shareRequired: Share with {{count}} people to enable registration.
register.shareMessage: Join Link x Link and connect with people on WhatsApp: {{url}}
register.nameHelp: This is how other people will see you on your card.
register.descriptionHelp: Shown on your card, under your name. Say something short about yourself.
register.birthdateHelp: Only used to check you are over 18. It is not stored or shown on your profile.
register.whatsappHelp: The number people will message when they tap your card. Validated for the country you pick.
register.photosHelp: Shown on your card. Optimized automatically before upload.
register.validationAge: You must be over 18 to register.
register.phoneTooShort: The number is too short for the selected country.
register.phoneTooLong: The number is too long for the selected country.
register.phoneInvalid: The number is not valid for the selected country.
register.validationPhotoSize: Each photo must be under {{mb}} MB.
register.duplicate: That WhatsApp number is already registered.
register.ownershipPrompt: Is that number yours? Report it so a moderator can review it.
register.ownershipFiled: Report sent. A moderator will review your request.
register.success: Done! Your profile was submitted. It will be visible once an moderator approves it.
register.error: Could not submit your registration. Please try again.

profileFields.interestedInHelp: It doesn't filter profiles yet; it will be used later.
profileFields.regionHelp: The area you're from. The country is taken from your number's code.

account.noProfile: You haven't created your profile yet.
account.visibilityHelp: Controls whether your profile is shown to others. You can turn it back on anytime.
account.replacePhotoHelp: Upload a new image to replace the current one.

dev.help: Admins only. Stored on this device. With everything off, the app behaves like it does for everyone else.

admin.title: Admin
admin.moderatorSearchHelp: Search by email and make them a moderator or admin.
admin.confirmPromoteModText: {{email}} will be able to approve, deny, and skip pending profiles.
admin.confirmPromoteAdminText: {{email}} will get full control: manage moderators, other admins, and see all stats.
admin.confirmRemoveModText: {{email}} will lose access to the moderation panel.
admin.confirmRemoveAdminText: {{email}} will lose full control of the panel.

admin.loginHelper: Creating new moderators or recovering a password is in development — contact a system administrator.

admin.moderationHint: Drag or use arrow keys to skip. Use the buttons to approve or deny.
